title: Egyptian Beef Bowl
description: A flavorful and nutritious beef bowl inspired by Egyptian cuisine, featuring tender beef, crunchy vegetables, and creamy tahini sauce.
instructions: Heat 2 tablespoons of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
Transfer the beef to a plate and set aside.
Add more oil to the skillet if necessary, then add the garlic, paprika, and cumin powder.
Add the chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Return the beef to the skillet and simmer for 10-12 minutes or until cooked through.
Transfer the beef to a plate and let rest for 5 minutes.
Slice the beef into thin strips and place in the bowl.
Drizzle with tahini sauce and sprinkle with crispy fried onions and chopped parsley.
